title: conyza × barcinonensis
intro: Conyza × barcinonensis, also known as hybrid fleabane, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce pain and swelling, as well as protect against cell damage. Conyza × barcinonensis has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, skin conditions, and digestive issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed internally or applied topically to the skin.
